description: Resolve Bolt inventory targets from the OpenVox GUI ENC database

group.description: Optional: only return targets from this ENC group

ssl_verify.description: Verify SSL certificates when calling the API

api_token.description: Raw API token to authenticate with the OpenVox GUI

token_file.description: Path to a file containing the API token (defaults to /etc/puppetlabs/bolt/.bolt_token)

run_as.description: Optional: user to run commands/tasks as on targets (e.g. 'root'). When omitted, commands run as the SSH transport user (typically 'bolt'). The GUI requests escalation per-invocation via 'sudo ' prefix (for ad-hoc commands) or --run-as (for tasks).

run_as_command.description: Optional: command used to change user when run_as is specified (e.g. ['sudo'] or ['sudo', '-E']). Only relevant if run_as is also supplied.
